---
title: "Theory"
toc: false
---
::: {.eyebrow}
the model, from the ground up
:::

What `plant` actually solves, and why. Consolidates material currently
scattered across papers and vignettes.

## Core

The demographic and physiological machinery shared by every strategy.

- [The size-structured PDE](size-structured-pde.qmd) — demography of
  individuals, patches, and metacommunities.
- [Assimilation & hydraulics](assimilation-hydraulics.qmd) — the leaf-level
  carbon and water economy.
- [Adaptive dynamics](adaptive-dynamics.qmd) — invasion fitness and
  evolutionary endpoints.

## Models {#models}

The physiological strategies that plug into that machinery — each a concrete
set of growth, fecundity, and mortality functions. See the
[models overview](models/index.qmd).

- [FF16](models/ff16.qmd) — the trait-based functional-balance model.
- [K93](models/k93.qmd) — Kohyama's basal-area competition model.
- [TF24](models/tf24.qmd) — the hydraulically-coupled leaf model.

## Implementation {#implementation}

How the equations are solved numerically. See the
[implementation overview](implementation/index.qmd).

- [The characteristic method](implementation/characteristic-method.qmd)
- [ODE stepping & control](implementation/ode-stepping.qmd)
- [The node-spacing algorithm](implementation/node-spacing.qmd)
- [Canopy & light-environment models](implementation/canopy-models.qmd)
